sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 381 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.20. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.12.2025 Mr. Asad Aftab Solangi, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same is taken on record. Ms. Asma Aftab, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-VI, CTO, Karachi, is present and sates that the reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
